## Checklist
- [ ] Sudah coba reload halaman + clear browser cache
- [ ] Bukan duplikat issue yang sudah ada (search dulu)
- [ ] Bukan medical/clinical concern (kalau iya, pakai `clinical_concern.md`)
- [ ] Bukan security issue (kalau iya, email security@aervinex.id)
